name: Beltway Gun & Pawn
description_short: Beltway Gun & Pawn specializes in used and new firearms, tactical weapons, and ammunition sales with both in-store and online inventory. Located in Matthews, NC, they operate as a pawn shop with a primary focus on firearms and related accessories.
description_long:
Beltway Gun & Pawn is a firearms-focused pawn shop located at 11500 E Independence Blvd, Suite B in Matthews, North Carolina. The business operates as a retail dealer for used and new firearms with an emphasis on quality inventory and customer service. They maintain both a physical storefront and an online presence through GunBroker.com, allowing customers to browse and purchase items through multiple channels.

The company offers a comprehensive selection of firearms across multiple brands including Colt, S&W, Browning, Remington, Ruger, and Winchester. Their inventory includes used firearms, new firearms, and specialized tactical weapons such as AR rifles in .223 and .308 calibers, plus tactical handguns from brands like Glock, Ruger, S&W, H&K, and Sig Sauer. Beyond firearms, they stock ammunition in nearly every caliber, reloading supplies, cleaning supplies, magazines, and various accessories. The store also carries WWII period military and collectible firearms for enthusiasts.

What distinguishes Beltway Gun & Pawn is their dual focus on tactical modern firearms alongside historical and collectible pieces, combined with their multi-channel sales approach (in-store and online through GunBroker). They position themselves as a one-stop shop for both ammunition and accessories rather than firearms alone. Their website emphasizes breadth of inventory across calibers and brands, and they encourage walk-in visits to their physical location.

As a pawn shop primarily focused on firearms sales rather than traditional collateral-based lending, Beltway Gun & Pawn serves a niche market of firearms enthusiasts, collectors, and tactical weapon buyers. The business operates standard retail hours (9 AM–5 PM based on current information) and accepts contact via phone, email, and an online contact form. No information is provided on their website regarding traditional pawn lending services, financial products, or credit-related offerings.

pros: Extensive firearms inventory spanning multiple major brands (Colt, S&W, Browning, Remington, Ruger, Winchester)
Specialized tactical weapons selection including AR rifles and tactical handguns from H&K, Sig Sauer, and Glock
Comprehensive ammunition stock available in nearly every caliber
Collateral accessories including reloading supplies, cleaning supplies, and magazines
Dual sales channels with both physical storefront and online GunBroker presence for wider reach
Collectible and WWII period military firearms for enthusiasts and collectors
Multiple contact methods available (phone, email, online form)
cons: Website lacks detailed pricing information; no prices listed for firearms or merchandise
No information provided about traditional pawn lending services or collateral-based loans despite pawn shop classification
Limited transparency on return policies, warranties, or shipping policies for online purchases
Website design is repetitive with excessive 'CLICK THE LINK' text; minimal professional presentation
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials visible on the website to verify service quality
best_for: Firearms enthusiasts and collectors seeking used or new weapons from major manufacturers
Tactical weapon buyers looking for AR rifles, tactical handguns, and modern platforms
Ammunition shoppers needing access to multiple calibers and reloading supplies
Military history collectors interested in WWII period firearms and historical pieces
diagnosis: Beltway Gun & Pawn is best suited for firearms buyers, collectors, and tactical weapon enthusiasts seeking inventory from established manufacturers with both retail and online access. The primary caveat is that while classified as a pawn shop, the website contains no information about traditional pawn lending, collateral-based loans, or financial services—the business appears to function primarily as a firearms retailer rather than as a general pawn operation.
services: Tactical firearms including AR rifles in .223 and .308 calibers
Tactical handguns (Glock, Ruger, S&W, H&K, Sig Sauer brands)
WWII period military and collectible firearms
Firearm cleaning supplies and maintenance products
